title: vicia hirsutissima
intro: Vicia hirsutissima, also known as hairy vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing symptoms of arthritis and improving digestion. Hairy vetch can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and as a natural remedy for skin conditions.
